{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Emperor's sculpture
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Emperor's sculpture]] includes a severed head.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Emperor's sculpture]] is a ball of stone bigger than the entire crew.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
